title: Issuance of license; board's discretion
doc_html:
§405.  Issuance of license; board's discretion

The board, after receipt and consideration of the application and investigation report, may issue or refuse to issue the authority to engage in the business requested.

Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.
doc_text:
§405.  Issuance of license; board's discretion
The board, after receipt and consideration of the application and investigation report, may issue or refuse to issue the authority to engage in the business requested.
Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.
